title: Backport env-var-leak fix from cleanup_stale_edges to run_reindex
analysis: run_reindex() in reindex.py has the same structural bug that Task 139 fixed in cleanup_stale_edges.py. Two concrete issues: (1) os.environ['CONFIG_PATH'] is mutated at line 156 outside any try block with no save/restore — if any subsequent constructor (FusedMemoryConfig at line 158, MemoryService at line 159, OpenAIEmbedder at line 172, ReindexManager at line 174) raises, CONFIG_PATH is permanently corrupted. (2) All four constructors run at lines 158-178 BEFORE the try block at line 180 — if MemoryService succeeds at line 159 but OpenAIEmbedder (line 172) or ReindexManager (line 174) raises, execution never enters the try block so the finally block never runs, meaning service.close() is never called and the MemoryService is leaked. The fix mirrors the established pattern in cleanup_stale_edges.run_cleanup(): save old_config_path before try, set service=None sentinel, move all constructor calls and os.environ mutation inside the try block, and conditionally close service + restore CONFIG_PATH in finally. run_reindex() has more constructors than run_cleanup() (adding OpenAIEmbedderConfig, OpenAIEmbedder, and ReindexManager vs just CleanupManager), so the test coverage is expanded to cover each additional constructor failure point. The existing test_reindex.py TestRunReindex class (lines 791-915) tests happy path and runtime errors but has NO tests for constructor-failure env-var restoration or service lifecycle — this is the gap we fill.

steps.description: Write failing test class TestRunReindexEnvVarRestore with test_restores_env_var_when_config_constructor_fails: save original CONFIG_PATH, patch fused_memory.maintenance.reindex.FusedMemoryConfig to raise RuntimeError('config error'), call run_reindex(config_path='test.yaml') expecting RuntimeError, assert os.environ.get('CONFIG_PATH') == original. Wrap assertion in try/finally safety net to restore CONFIG_PATH if test itself fails. Mirror exact pattern from TestRunCleanupEnvVarRestore.test_restores_env_var_when_config_constructor_fails (test_cleanup_stale_edges.py lines 402-427). This WILL FAIL because env var mutation at line 156 is outside the try block with no restore logic.

Write failing test class TestRunReindexServiceLifecycle with test_closes_service_when_manager_constructor_fails: patch FusedMemoryConfig (success with embedder config attrs), MemoryService (success, returns mock_service with AsyncMock close), OpenAIEmbedder (success), ReindexManager (raises RuntimeError('manager error')). Call run_reindex() expecting RuntimeError. Assert mock_service.close.assert_awaited_once(). This WILL FAIL because ReindexManager() at line 174 raises before the try block at line 180, so the finally at line 194 never executes and service.close() is never called.

Restructure run_reindex() in reindex.py to match the cleanup_stale_edges pattern: (1) Add 'old_config_path = os.environ.get("CONFIG_PATH")' before try, (2) Add 'service = None' sentinel before try, (3) Move 'if config_path is not None: os.environ["CONFIG_PATH"] = config_path' inside try, (4) Move all constructor calls (FusedMemoryConfig, MemoryService, embedder config setup, OpenAIEmbedder, ReindexManager) inside try, (5) Change finally to: 'if service is not None: await service.close()' plus CONFIG_PATH restore logic (if config_path is not None: pop if old was None, else restore old value). Steps 1-2 failing tests now pass, and all existing TestRunReindex tests remain green.

Add test_restores_env_var_when_service_constructor_fails to TestRunReindexEnvVarRestore: patch FusedMemoryConfig (success), MemoryService (raises RuntimeError('service error')), call run_reindex(config_path='test.yaml') expecting RuntimeError, assert CONFIG_PATH restored. Mirror pattern from TestRunCleanupEnvVarRestore.test_restores_env_var_when_service_constructor_fails. Should pass immediately with step-3's implementation.

Add test_restores_env_var_when_embedder_constructor_fails to TestRunReindexEnvVarRestore: patch FusedMemoryConfig (success with embedder config attrs), MemoryService (success), OpenAIEmbedder (raises RuntimeError('embedder error')), call run_reindex(config_path='test.yaml') expecting RuntimeError, assert CONFIG_PATH restored. This is reindex-specific — cleanup_stale_edges has no embedder constructor. Should pass immediately.

Add test_restores_env_var_when_manager_constructor_fails to TestRunReindexEnvVarRestore: patch FusedMemoryConfig (success), MemoryService (success), OpenAIEmbedder (success), ReindexManager (raises RuntimeError('manager error')), call run_reindex(config_path='test.yaml') expecting RuntimeError, assert CONFIG_PATH restored. Should pass immediately.

Add test_closes_service_when_embedder_constructor_fails to TestRunReindexServiceLifecycle: patch FusedMemoryConfig (success with embedder config attrs), MemoryService (success, returns mock_service), OpenAIEmbedder (raises RuntimeError('embedder error')). Call run_reindex() expecting RuntimeError. Assert mock_service.close.assert_awaited_once(). Should pass immediately with step-3's implementation.

Add test_skips_close_when_service_never_created to TestRunReindexServiceLifecycle: patch FusedMemoryConfig to raise RuntimeError('config error') — service is never constructed. Call run_reindex() expecting RuntimeError. Assert no AttributeError occurs and the exception propagates cleanly. Verifies the service=None sentinel guard works correctly when MemoryService was never instantiated.

Optionally wrap service.close() in try/except per convention (memory id 458388ca): change 'if service is not None: await service.close()' to 'if service is not None: try: await service.close() except Exception: logger.warning("Error closing service", exc_info=True)'. This is a defensive pattern that prevents close() errors from masking the original exception. Run full test suite to verify no regressions.

design_decisions.decision: Mirror the exact cleanup_stale_edges.run_cleanup() pattern for CONFIG_PATH save/restore and service lifecycle
design_decisions.rationale: Task 139 established this as the canonical fix pattern. Using the identical structure (old_config_path save, service=None sentinel, all construction inside try, guarded close + restore in finally) ensures consistency across maintenance entrypoints and makes the codebase easier to audit.

design_decisions.decision: Move ALL four constructors (FusedMemoryConfig, MemoryService, OpenAIEmbedder, ReindexManager) inside the try block, not just some
design_decisions.rationale: Any constructor that runs after the os.environ mutation must be inside the try block to ensure CONFIG_PATH is restored on failure. Moving all of them keeps the pattern simple and uniform — there's no cost to wrapping FusedMemoryConfig too, and it exactly matches the cleanup_stale_edges pattern.

design_decisions.decision: Add reindex-specific tests for embedder constructor failure (not present in cleanup_stale_edges tests)
design_decisions.rationale: run_reindex() has two additional constructors (OpenAIEmbedderConfig + OpenAIEmbedder) that run_cleanup() lacks. OpenAIEmbedder failure is the most likely failure point in practice (e.g., missing OPENAI_API_KEY), so it deserves explicit test coverage for both env-var restore and service lifecycle.

design_decisions.decision: Keep service.close() try/except wrapping as a separate optional step (step-9)
design_decisions.rationale: The cleanup_stale_edges reference implementation does NOT wrap close() in try/except. The task description marks this as optional per a convention (memory id 458388ca). Implementing it as a separate step keeps the core fix reviewable on its own and avoids creating an inconsistency between the two entrypoints.

design_decisions.decision: Use the same test class naming convention as cleanup_stale_edges: TestRunReindexEnvVarRestore and TestRunReindexServiceLifecycle
design_decisions.rationale: Consistent naming with TestRunCleanupEnvVarRestore and TestRunCleanupServiceLifecycle makes it obvious these are the backported equivalents and helps with test discovery.

reuse.what: CONFIG_PATH save/restore + service=None sentinel pattern from run_cleanup()
reuse.how: Copy the exact structural pattern: old_config_path = os.environ.get('CONFIG_PATH') before try, service = None before try, all constructors inside try, conditional close + CONFIG_PATH restore in finally. Adapt for reindex's additional constructors (embedder config, OpenAIEmbedder).

Mirror test structure: save original CONFIG_PATH, patch constructor to raise, call run_reindex(config_path='test.yaml'), assert CONFIG_PATH equals original after exception. Wrap in try/finally for test safety. Adapt patch paths from 'fused_memory.maintenance.cleanup_stale_edges.*' to 'fused_memory.maintenance.reindex.*' and add extra patches for OpenAIEmbedder.

Mirror test structure: patch constructors to succeed up to the failing one, patch the target constructor to raise, assert mock_service.close was awaited. Adapt for reindex's additional constructors and patch paths.

reuse.what: Existing TestRunReindex mock setup pattern (mock_config attributes)
reuse.how: Reuse the same mock_config attribute setup: mock_config.embedder.dimensions = 1536, .providers.openai.api_key = 'test-key', .model = 'text-embedding-3-small'. Use the same patch targets ('fused_memory.maintenance.reindex.FusedMemoryConfig', '.MemoryService', '.OpenAIEmbedder', '.ReindexManager').
